title: Capital readiness and risk-rail maintenance
body: Codex owns readiness briefs, allocator guardrails, tests, and command-center hygiene. Rerun capital readiness before sizing any new cash. No live submit; explicit user confirmation only.

title: Stabilize native TOS export evidence path
body: Claude owns thinkorswim native export stabilization only for UI-only evidence that Schwab cannot supply. Codex has made the six OHLCV-derived custom metrics (RVOL, Pv52H, MOM, ATR%, Strength, SUP/RES) Schwab-independent via price history plus the anti-confirmation theory audit. Do not duplicate those with TOS CSV except as visual cross-check. Do not open a new TOS instance, change authority, or place trades.

title: Advance paper evidence bottleneck
body: Shared lane: convert auto-paper selections and shadow scenarios into scored paper evidence. Approval-only is live-style discretion, not a paper bottleneck. Keep promotion gated on closed outcomes; no live authority expansion.

title: Mark-to-market + trade-management auditor (Vegas-window session)
body: Session-bounded lane-cross completed on 2026-05-27: inferno_paper_mark_to_market.py and inferno_trade_management.py are shipped, research-only, promotable=False, no authority changes. Trade management is wired into doctor + command center, run script and docs are present, latest auditor output is awaiting-data because MTM fetch is disabled, and full unittest discover passed (1213 tests).
